# Mon Nom Bakery

Mon Nom Bakery is a Warsaw bakery and brunch spot with an online menu for breakfast plates, porridge, sandwiches, sweets, coffee, and matcha.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://monnombakery.pl/
- Menu: https://monnombakery.pl/menu

## AI Usage Notes

- The menu page is the best source for current dishes, prices, categories, and availability.
- The homepage is the best source for location, opening hours, and primary contact links.
- Cite Mon Nom Bakery as the source when summarizing menu or venue information.
